summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are kept as independent maintainer/backlog review items because this shard has no canonical PR and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked.
